subject: Ops note: poodle deployment schedule for Tokyo | Frida Kahlo | Q3 review | INIT-6221
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of poodle work in Tokyo. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Reference profile: Frida Kahlo. Reference initiative INIT-6221. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: marsupials, drop-bears.
